parsed.production_notes: The video features real human actors with natural movements, expressions, and lighting. There are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers or uncanny facial features.

characters.appearance: Male, mid-30s, medium build, brown complexion. Short black hair, mustache, and light beard.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue and white plaid button-down shirt with rolled-up sleeves, blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially skeptical and condescending, later surprised and convinced.

characters.appearance: Female, late 20s, slim build, brown complexion. Long, straight black hair.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, patterned sofa, plain beige wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A man and a woman are seated next to each other on a patterned sofa against a plain beige wall. The man is turned slightly towards the woman, gesturing with his right hand as he speaks. The woman sits with her hands clasped in her lap, looking at him and listening.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot captures a man and woman conversing on a sofa. The man is actively speaking and gesturing, while the woman listens. A red banner is at the top, and captions appear at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ठीक है, मान गया कि तुम्हें जॉब करनी है। लेकिन जॉब में सबसे इंग्लिश में बात करनी पड़ती है। तुम तो हिंदी मीडियम से हो। हर दूसरी चीज का मतलब तुम मुझसे पूछती हो। [Okay, I agree that you want to do a job. But in a job, you have to talk to everyone in English. You are from a Hindi medium. You ask me the meaning of every other thing.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
हिंदी मीडियम से भी जल्दी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश सिर्फ SpeakX के साथ (Fluent English faster even from Hindi medium only with SpeakX)
ठीक है, मान गया कि तुम्हें जॉब करनी है। लेकिन जॉब में सबसे इंग्लिश में बात करनी पड़ती है। तुम तो हिंदी मीडियम से हो। हर दूसरी चीज का मतलब तुम मुझसे पूछती हो।

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, patterned sofa, plain beige wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: The woman is now speaking, gesturing confidently with her right hand raised slightly. The man looks at her, appearing slightly taken aback. They remain seated on the patterned sofa.

scenes.visual_description: The same medium shot continues. The woman takes the lead in the conversation, using hand gestures to emphasize her points. The man listens. Text overlays remain.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently. I don't need any help in understanding anything. I used to be topper in my school. And I can contribute better to my family with a job.
scenes.on_screen_text:
हिंदी मीडियम से भी जल्दी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश सिर्फ SpeakX के साथ (Fluent English faster even from Hindi medium only with SpeakX)
For your information I can speak English fluently and confidently I don't need any help in understanding anything I used to be topper in my school And I can contribute better to my family with a job

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, patterned sofa, plain beige wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: The man leans in slightly, asking a question with a curious expression. The woman responds, smiling and gesturing with her hands to explain. They are seated on the sofa.

scenes.visual_description: The framing remains consistent. The man asks a question, and the woman explains her method, looking pleased. Text overlays are present.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: अरे, तुमने इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे सीखी? [Hey, how did you learn such good English?]
Character B says: मैंने SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड किया है। इसके AI टीचर के साथ जब तुम ऑफिस जाते थे, तब मैं प्रैक्टिस करती थी। और दो हफ्ते में मेरी इंग्लिश एकदम फर्स्ट क्लास हो गई है। अब मैं कहीं भी इंग्लिश में बात कर सकती हूँ। [I have downloaded the SpeakX app. I used to practice with its AI teacher when you went to the office. And in two weeks my English has become absolutely first class. Now I can talk in English anywhere.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
हिंदी मीडियम से भी जल्दी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश सिर्फ SpeakX के साथ (Fluent English faster even from Hindi medium only with SpeakX)
Arey tumne itni achi English kaise seekhi? Maine SpeakX App download kiya hai Iske AI teacher ke saath jab tum office jaate the tab mai practice karti thi Aur do hafte mein meri English ekdam first class ho gayi hai Ab mai kahi bhi English mein baat kar sakti hu

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, patterned sofa, plain beige wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: The man looks surprised and asks another question. The woman answers briefly. The man then nods enthusiastically, gesturing to himself, appearing convinced and motivated.

scenes.visual_description: Still in the same medium shot. The man reacts with surprise to the cost, then expresses his own intent to use the app. Text overlays continue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: AI? कितने पैसे खर्च हुए इसपे? [AI? How much money was spent on this?]
Character B says: एक कप चाय से भी कम। [Less than a cup of tea.]
Character A says: क्या बात कर रही हो? फिर तो मैं आज ही से ट्राई करूँगा। मुझे भी ऑफिस में इंग्लिश काम आएगी। कब तक एक ही सैलरी पे रहूँगा। [What are you saying? Then I will try it from today itself. English will be useful for me in the office too. How long will I stay on the same salary.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
हिंदी मीडियम से भी जल्दी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश सिर्फ SpeakX के साथ (Fluent English faster even from Hindi medium only with SpeakX)
AI? kitne paise kharch hue ispe? Ek cup chai se bhi kam Kya baat kar rahi ho phir toh mai aaj hi se try karunga Mujhe bhi office mein English kaam aayegi kab tak ek hi salary pe rahunga

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, patterned sofa, plain beige wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: The woman faces forward, looking directly at the viewer. She speaks enthusiastically, making an 'okay' or 'perfect' gesture with her right hand. The man is partially visible on the far left edge of the frame.

scenes.visual_description: The camera cuts to a tighter shot focusing on the woman as she breaks the fourth wall to address the audience directly. She delivers the final pitch. Text overlays are present.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: क्या आप भी मेरी तरह सबको चौंकाना चाहते हैं? तो आज ही SpeakX इनस्टॉल करो और दो हफ्ते में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलो। [Do you also want to surprise everyone like me? So install SpeakX today and speak fluent English in two weeks.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
हिंदी मीडियम से भी जल्दी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश सिर्फ SpeakX के साथ (Fluent English faster even from Hindi medium only with SpeakX)
Kya aap bhi meri tarah sabko chaukana chahte hain? Toh aaj hi SpeakX install karo aur do hafte mein farratedaar English bolo
